title: Voxtral Cloud Voices
description: Create a Mistral API key in your workspace settings, paste it here, then turn Voxtral on when you want cloud voices available. Voxtral requests are processed by Mistral instead of staying fully local.

x-ui.locked_message: Verify this engine before turning Voxtral on.

mistral_api_key.title: Mistral API Key
mistral_api_key.description: Paste your Mistral API key here.

voxtral_model.title: Voxtral Model
voxtral_model.description: Select the Voxtral model used for cloud synthesis.

x-ui.summary: Create a Mistral API key in your workspace settings, paste it here, then turn Voxtral on when you want cloud voices available. Voxtral requests are processed by Mistral instead of staying fully local.
x-ui.privacy_notice: Privacy note: turning on Voxtral sends the text you synthesize, and any selected reference audio, to Mistral's servers. Keep voices on XTTS (Local) if you want your workflow to stay fully local.
